allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/firebase/package.json'\); console.log\(p.version, p.exports ? 'has exports' : 'no exports'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/firebase/package.json'\); const auth = p.exports && p.exports['./auth']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(auth, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(p.get\('exports', {}\), indent=2\)[:3000]\); print\('typesVersions:', json.dumps\(p.get\('typesVersions', {}\), indent=2\)[:1000]\); print\('types:', p.get\('types',''\)\); print\('main:', p.get\('main',''\)\)")
